^(run_id)$.description: A unique ID for this execution run, useful for looking up logs or reporting issues.

json.description: The output data produced by the action, structured according to the action's output schema.

message.description: A human-readable summary of the result or any relevant status information.

name.description: The name of the action that was executed.

proto.description: An alternate binary encoding of the output, if provided by the action.

runId.description: A unique ID for this execution run, useful for looking up logs or reporting issues.
